precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)

precheck.description: Check backfill-bug-id has work to do
precheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "public"."bug" WHERE "id" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

execute.sql: UPDATE "public"."bug" SET "id" = gen_random_uuid()::char(36) WHERE "id" IS NULL

postcheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "public"."bug" WHERE "id" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."bug" WHERE "id" IS NULL)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."bug" ALTER COLUMN "id" SET NOT NULL

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
    AND is_nullable = 'NO'
)

precheck.description: ensure primary key "bug_pkey" does not exist
precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'bug_pkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."bug"')
)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."bug" ADD CONSTRAINT "bug_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'bug_pkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."bug"')
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'bug_id_fkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'

execute.sql:
ALTER TABLE "public"."bug"
ADD CONSTRAINT "bug_id_fkey"
FOREIGN KEY ("id")
REFERENCES "public"."task" ("id")
ON DELETE CASCADE

postcheck.sql:

  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid

)
